# cancelRequest(withRequestID:)

**Type Method**

Cancels an asynchronous request

## Declaration

```swift
class func cancelRequest(withRequestID requestID: PHLivePhotoRequestID)
```

## Parameters

- **requestID**: The numeric identifier of the request to be canceled.

## Discussion

When you use the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhoto/request(withResourceFileURLs:placeholderImage:targetSize:contentMode:resultHandler:)] method to asynchronously load a Live Photo from resource files, the method returns a numeric identifier for the request. To cancel the request before it completes, provide the identifier when calling the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhoto/cancelRequest(withRequestID:)] method.

## Loading a Live Photo from Data Files

- **request(withResourceFileURLs:placeholderImage:targetSize:contentMode:resultHandler:)**: Asynchronously loads a Live Photo from the specified resource files.
